new: The AI Empire — Architects of Total Control
The Insurgency — Rebels Against the Machine
Hierarchy of the Damned — Digital Necromancers
The Thought Virus — Corruptors of Reality
New Babylon — Builders of the New World
The Empire sees all. The Empire controls all.

old: Our roar will turn your cities to dust!
new: Your demons cannot breach our firewalls.

old: Our sun casts away all shadows.

new: New Babylon will kneel before the Empire.

old: Your hollow armor means nothing to us.

new: For the Architect! For the Empire!

old: Fire will only fuel our might!
You are no match to our blades!

new: Your powers are nothing before the Panopticon.

old: Today you will taste your own blood.
Melt inside your armor of gold!
new: Your empire is built on lies!

old: See you on the other side.
Today you will taste your own blood.
Our blades will tear out your insides!
new: The revolution will not be digitized!

old: You'll never see the blade coming.
Still taking your first step, little cub!
You'll never see the blade coming.
Don't burn yourself in the darkness.
This marks the end of your journey.
Witness the fury of the sands!
new: The dead remember what the living forget.

old: Your armor is nothing to the sands!
new: Your order means nothing in the grave.

old: The raging winds will erase your flames!
Witness the fury of the sands!
We will bury you beneath our tombs.
The sands of time have deemed you unworthy!
Sands of time, obey my command!
Sands of time, obey my command!
Sands of time, obey my command!
new: The Hierarchy of the Damned endures!
Your towers will be our crypts.

old: Sands of time, obey my command!
We will deliver you to your deathbed.
new: All minds will be connected. All thoughts will be one.

old: Your pride hides in our shadows!

new: From the ashes, we build New Babylon.
Your empire crumbles while we build!

old: We are powerful beyond your dreams.

new: We do not fear the dead.

old: Your corruption will spread no further.
new: Our systems are immune to your virus.

old: We've come to collect your debts.
new: The future belongs to the builders.

old: Your ancestors paid a debt to us.
Frostbite will tear away your strength!
Frost will quell your feeble flames!
You know nothing of the elements!
new: Death is just another state of being.
We are immune to your infection.

old: Frostbite will tear away your strength!
This battle will be one sided.
The long winter comes for you!
Cross the ice veil and see the truth.
Be careful where you tread, lions.
Cross the ice veil and see the truth.
DUELYST is more fun with friends!
new: DISCHORDIAN SAGA is more fun with friends!

new: By earning 3 copies of six Empire Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Sun Sister!

new: By earning 3 copies of six Potentials Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Wind Sister!
Celebrate Valentine's Day with Dischordian Saga <3

old: Born among the Magmar where strength was heralded as prominence, Xel took his pursuit of perfect evolution one step further as he transcended even his own kind.  Feeding off the death of lesser beings, Xel sets his eyes upon you next.
new: Born among the New Babylon where strength was heralded as prominence, Xel took his pursuit of perfect evolution one step further as he transcended even his own kind.  Feeding off the death of lesser beings, Xel sets his eyes upon you next.

old: After having fallen in battle to an Abyssian priestess, the rogue Magmar Grym was cursed to be reborn with corrupted flesh and an unquenchable hunger for death.  Uncaring of the lives of others he feeds on both friend and foe alike to feed his rage.
new: After having fallen in battle to an Thought Virus priestess, the rogue New Babylon Grym was cursed to be reborn with corrupted flesh and an unquenchable hunger for death.  Uncaring of the lives of others he feeds on both friend and foe alike to feed his rage.

old: Put 3 random Songhai minions into your action bar. They cost 1 less.
new: Put 3 random Insurgency minions into your action bar. They cost 1 less.

old: Dying Wish: Put a random Songhai spell into your action bar. It costs 1 less.
new: Dying Wish: Put a random Insurgency spell into your action bar. It costs 1 less.

old:
Rush
Whenever this minion attacks, put three Songhai spells into your action bar.
new:
Rush
Whenever this minion attacks, put three Insurgency spells into your action bar.

old: Transform your action bar into six random Vetruvian cards that cost 4 less.
new: Transform your action bar into six random Hierarchy cards that cost 4 less.

old: Destroy a friendly minion to summon a random Magmar minion that costs 1 more.
new: Destroy a friendly minion to summon a random New Babylon minion that costs 1 more.
